name: temporal-developer
description: Comprehensive skill for developing Temporal applications across Python, TypeScript, Go, and Java.

interface.shortDescription: Build reliable Temporal workflows, activities, and workers in Python, TypeScript, Go, and Java
interface.longDescription: Comprehensive guidance for developing Temporal applications — creating workflows, activities, and workers; handling signals, queries, and updates; debugging non-determinism errors; implementing saga patterns, versioning strategies, and testing approaches across Python, TypeScript, Go, and Java SDKs.
